note: Coordinates are ratios of page dimensions. Pages are 17x11 inch landscape (ANSI B). Calibrated against testFile1HDR.pdf page 1.

full_title_block.description: Complete title block region, bottom-right quadrant

top_right_grid.description: FHWA info box: region, state, project no, sheet no, total sheets

revision_table.description: Release table: NO, DESCRIPTION OF RELEASE, DATE, DESIGN/DRAWN/CHECKED, NAME, DATE columns

division_title.description: ADOT division name, drawing title (SR 202L / RETAINING WALL...), station range, and LOCATION line

stamp_area.description: Engineer stamp seal (circular), right side of title block

firm_area.description: Firm logo/name area: CONNECT 202, SALT RIVER SEGMENT, Stanley Consultants, etc.

bottom_info_bar.description: Bottom bar with route, TRACS NO, project number, sheet/total. Spans full width.

rw_number_area.description: RW-003.XXX and sheet count at far right
